name: send_transactional_with_html
prompt: Send a transactional email from noreply@acme.com to user@example.com with the subject 'Welcome' and an HTML body saying Hello World

name: send_bulk_email
prompt: Send a bulk marketing email from marketing@acme.com to newsletter@example.com about our Spring Sale

name: send_batch_from_file
prompt: I have a file called emails.json with 50 transactional emails. Send them all.

name: send_with_template
prompt: Send a transactional email using template UUID abc-123 to user@test.com from app@acme.com

name: sandbox_send_to_inbox
prompt: Send a test email to my sandbox 12345 from test@example.com to dev@test.com with subject 'Test'

name: list_domains
prompt: Show me all my sending domains

name: create_domain
prompt: Add acme.com as a new sending domain

name: create_template_with_variables
prompt: Create a template called 'Order Confirmation' with subject 'Order #{{order_id}} confirmed' and HTML body with order details

name: get_stats_for_date_range
prompt: Show me email sending statistics for January 2024

name: stats_grouped_by_domain
prompt: Break down my sending stats by domain for Q1 2024

name: create_contact_with_lists
prompt: Add john@acme.com as a contact with name John Smith and add them to lists 1 and 2

name: import_contacts_from_file
prompt: Import contacts from my contacts.json file into list 5

name: inspect_sandbox_message
prompt: Show me the spam score of message 999 in inbox 123

name: download_eml
prompt: Download the EML file for message 456 in inbox 789 and save it to email.eml

name: create_api_token
prompt: Create a new API token called 'CI Pipeline'

name: configure_cli
prompt: Set up the CLI with my API token abc123xyz

name: json_output_for_scripting
prompt: List all templates and give me the output as JSON so I can pipe it to jq

name: clean_sandbox
prompt: Delete all messages in sandbox 555

name: create_sub_account
prompt: Create a sub-account called 'Staging' under organization org-42

name: send_with_cc_bcc
prompt: Send a transactional email from boss@acme.com to team@acme.com, CC manager@acme.com, BCC hr@acme.com with subject 'Update'
